query:
ALTER TABLE tasks
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS startDate BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS followUpDate BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastViewedAt BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS campaignId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pipelineId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS workflowId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sequenceId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meetingDate BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meetingLocation VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meetingAgenda TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meetingAttendees TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendarEventId VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productName VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS proposalUrl VARCHAR(1024) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS revenueAmount BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS revenueCurrency VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT 'USD',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS whatsappNumber VARCHAR(32) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dialerCallId VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailThreadId VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS businessCategory VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS businessType VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS visitorTracked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS battleCardId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS documents TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notificationSentAt BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notificationMessage VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS touchLog TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS touchCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastTouchedAt BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS forecastCategory VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS forecastCloseDate BIGINT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute 
ALTER TABLE tasks
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS startDate BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS followUpDate BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastViewedAt BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS campaignId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pipelineId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS workflowId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sequenceId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meetingDate BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meetingLocation VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meetingAgenda TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meetingAttendees TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendarEventId VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productName VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS proposalUrl VARCHAR(1024) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS revenueAmount BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS revenueCurrency VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT 'USD',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS whatsappNumber VARCHAR(32) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dialerCallId VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailThreadId VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS businessCategory VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS businessType VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS visitorTracked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS battleCardId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS documents TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notificationSentAt BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notificationMessage VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS touchLog TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS touchCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastTouchedAt BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS forecastCategory VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS forecastCloseDate BIGINT NULL;
